titleStmt.title: SII 5.438: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 438. (A.R. No. 147 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiruvāykeḻvikku mel śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīsundara pāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉoṉṟāvati ṉetirāmāṇṭi ṉetirāmāṇṭu miṉanāyaṟṟup pattoṉpatān tiyatiyum Aparapakṣa ttu navamiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvati nāḷ
Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil Ātiśaṇḍeśvarade varkku melvempanāṭṭuc cuttavalliyāṉa viraviṉotaccaturvve timaṅkalattu mahāsabhai- yom piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉār koyilil viḻuppātarāyar Eḻuntaruḷuvi
tta Aḻakiyatirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārkku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭikkut tiruppaṭiyil nirvārttup pū Oṉṟukkuk kuṭuppomāṉa Ūṟkālāl Okkum Aṟunāḻikkālāle kārukku nellu muppatiṉ kalamum pacāṉattukku nellu muppatiṉ kalamu(m)mākak kuṭuppomākavum
Okkummiṭattuk kārukku Aṟpacimāsamum pacāṉattukkuc cittiraimāsamum viṟṟa vilaippaṭiyāl varum Accu Eṅkaḷuril Antarāyam viṭuttūṇukkuc cikāriyañceyvārkaḷil yyā ṭilamutuñ ceyyumpaṭiyoṭe kūṭi Itaṉetirāmāṇṭu kārmuta leṟṟi yeḻuti
vara Appiṭipāṭu vāṅkikkoṇṭu cantrā tittavat Iṟuttuvaruvomākavum Ippaṭi kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi sammatittu piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭuttom mahāsabhai yom Ādicaṇḍeśvarade varkku . Ippaṭi sammaticcuk kurovi yajña muttibha ṭṭa
somayāsi yār makaṉ bhavadroṇabha ṭṭasomayāji Eḻuttu Ivai karāmpicceṭṭu śrītevabha ṭṭa vā[ja]peyayāji Eḻuttu Ivai karāmpicceṭṭut tiruveṇkāṭu bha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai kalacai dakṣaṇaā muttibha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai Aṭṭampuṟattu śrīlakṣmaṇabha ṭṭar makaṉ
cirāmabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai kalacaip pavarutrabha ṭṭasya Ippaṭikku Ivai naṭātūr cikṛṣṇabha ṭṭasomayājiyar makaṉ di vākarabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai Aḷḷūr bhavasyo mabha ṭṭasoma yājiyar makaṉ cirāmabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai karāmpicceṭṭu śrīkṛūṣṇabha ṭṭar makaṉ bhavatbha ṭṭa ṉe
ḻuttu Ivai nālūr tiruveṇkāṭubha ṭṭar makaṉ dā motarabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu vaṭṭamaṇi colaippirāṉbha ṭṭar makaṉ śrīvarākabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai śa mpubha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai muññaippaṭi śrīkuṇabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai vaṭṭamaṇi Iruṇikkubha ṭṭar makaṉ tivākarabha ṭṭa ṉe
ḻuttu Ivai sākaṇai vālentumaulibha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai vaṅkippuṟattuk kalacai vālentumaulibha ṭṭar makaṉ kumārasi ntubha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai komaṭattu śrī vāsudevabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai mākaḷur Āṭkoṇṭa villibha ṭṭasoma yaājiyār Eḻuttu
Ivai Aḷḷūr cimātavapaṭṭasomayāji Eḻuttu Ivai māṭilavan Aṉantanārāyaṇabha ṭṭasomāyāji Eḻuttu Ivai Irāyūr keruṭavāhaṉibha ṭṭa so mayāji Eḻuttu Ivai nālūr śrīnārasiṁ habha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai vereyampuṟattuc comittiribha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu
Ivai samvatsara vāriyaṉ (mā)māṅkuṭi viṉāyakabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Ippiṭipāṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr sabhai kkaṇakku curaṅkuṭaiyāṉ tāḷaṅkokRead koṇṭu.kūttāṭumpiḷḷai Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 5.438 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
